METRIC-089.summary: Monthly count of violations marked fixed, broken down by NYC borough
METRIC-089.sql_pattern: SELECT borough, DATE_TRUNC('month', fixed_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS fixed_count FROM violations WHERE status='FIXED' GROUP BY borough, month ORDER BY month DESC

METRIC-045.summary: Classification and breakdown of structural damage reports by borough and damage cause type
METRIC-045.sql_pattern: SELECT borough, damage_cause, COUNT(*) AS count FROM violations WHERE damage_type='structural' GROUP BY borough, damage_cause ORDER BY count DESC

METRIC-067.summary: Performance metrics for contractors including completion rates and quality scores
METRIC-067.sql_pattern: SELECT contractor_id, COUNT(*) AS total_projects, SUM(CASE WHEN status='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM built GROUP BY contractor_id

METRIC-123.summary: Time-series decomposition of violations into trend, seasonal, and residual components
METRIC-123.sql_pattern: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_date) AS week, COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM violations GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', created_date) ORDER BY week
